evidence: "Great comedy of parents who seal themselves off from the rest of the world mistakenly believing a nuclear war has taken place."
"A great story that needs to be seen."
"Not a good story line. It was slow to start, but did pick up on the action."
"The action never stops with the rest SG1 team as they battle the Goa'uld and others in exploring the galaxy."
"Plenty of car chases and some personal moments to add to the mix."
"The only reason I bought the movie was because of Patrick Stewart and Hugh Jackman."
"A bit cheesy, but this gives you the information on how the guyver really was to be."
"Glad to have found. Really a different twist to the old time travel and routine."
"One of the better marvel movies as of lately."
"Really good movie with Tom Cruise at the stick, once again."
"Interesting way it presented other humans trying to escape robotic terror to get to Earth."

summary: The user enjoys action-packed and comedic sci-fi content, often appreciating fast-paced storytelling. They show a preference for visual spectacle but are less concerned with narrative complexity and production quality.
